productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men White Casual Shoes
description: An absolutely cool casual shoe, this pair from numero uno is a great addition to your wardrobe. The all white uppers with green and silver accents in a classic sneaker style creates a strong impression. Team this with jeans and t-shirts for great urban style.UpperSynthetic leather upper for durability and comfortStitch detailing for added style and reinforcementSilver printed design, synthetic tape detailing and logo name on the side of the heel for greater styleLace-ups for a snug FitCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for added comfortBrand tab on the side and appliqued on the tongue MidsoleEVA midsole for better shock absorption and all day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole in diamond pattern on the forefoot and heel for maximum durability and tractionCircular panels with grooves on the forefoot and heel for better gripShoe careWipe synthetic leather surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
